rationale: The citing paper is a methodological study of common method variance (CMV) and bias in survey-based correlations/paths, and the cited paper directly models how response styles distort marketing scale scores and interscale correlations—an obvious mechanism-level overlap. Given this strong conceptual alignment and exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.38.2.143.18840), this citation is plausibly foundational/background-theory for the CMV argument rather than an incidental mention.
